# Evie Bowerman

> Graphic designer and photographer based in North Yorkshire, UK, specialising in brand identity, packaging, and image-led storytelling. Portfolio showcasing design projects and photography collections.

Evie Bowerman is a Northumbria University graduate with 4+ years of experience creating brand identities, packaging, typography, art direction, retouching, and photography. She is available for brand, packaging, and product/portrait photography projects.

## Portfolio — Design Projects

- [Stitch Tailoring](https://eviebowerman.com/stitch): Brand identity for a custom clothing brand abolishing the traditional sizing system (2024)
- [Wholesome Harvest](https://eviebowerman.com/wholesomeHarvest): Brand identity and packaging project (2024)
- [W7 Rebrand](https://eviebowerman.com/w7): Complete brand rebrand for W7 cosmetics (2023)
- [Marble Blue](https://eviebowerman.com/marble): Brand identity and packaging design (2024)
- [Label Less](https://eviebowerman.com/label): Brand identity project (2022)
- [Stump Cross Caverns](https://eviebowerman.com/stump-cross-caverns): Branding for a North Yorkshire cave tourism attraction (2025)
- [L.A. Women, The Doors](https://eviebowerman.com/doors): Creative design project (2023)

## Photography Collections

- [Wildlife](https://eviebowerman.com/wildlife): Wildlife photography from Borneo — orangutans, proboscis monkeys, and tropical birdlife
- [Pets](https://eviebowerman.com/pets): Pet portrait photography (2024)
- [Motion](https://eviebowerman.com/motion): Motion and action photography (2024)

## Core Pages

- [About](https://eviebowerman.com/about): Bio, capabilities (brand identity, packaging & print, photography, art direction, digital & social, retouching), working process, and current availability
- [Photography](https://eviebowerman.com/photos): Photography landing page with all collections
- [Contact](https://eviebowerman.com/contact): Get in touch for brand, packaging, or photography projects
